chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 1/12: Morning Rush
scene: 工作日早上七点，闹钟响了，你赶时间出门。（对话链：工作日）

turns.cn: 你要迟到了，地铁七点二十那班！
turns.en: You're gonna be late! The seven twenty train!

turns.cn: 知道了，我 shower 三分钟解决。

turns.en: Lifesaver. I'll drink it on the way.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 2/12: Grab Coffee on the Go
scene: 楼下咖啡店排队，你快速点单。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 3/12: On the Subway
scene: 地铁上很挤，有人问你下一站。（对话链：工作日）

turns.cn: 不好意思，这是去市中心的方向吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, is this the downtown direction?
Thanks. First time on this line.

turns.cn: 不客气，高峰期很挤，抓紧。
turns.en: No problem. Rush hour's packed. Hold on.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 4/12: Arrive at Office
scene: 九点前到公司，和同事打招呼。（对话链：工作日）

turns.en: Subway was okay. Almost missed it though.
Right. Let me boot up first.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 5/12: Morning Standup
scene: 站会轮到你发言。（对话链：工作日）

turns.en: Zhang Wei, yesterday, today, and blockers?

turns.cn: 昨天完成接口，今天写测试，没阻碍。
turns.en: Yesterday I finished the API. Today tests. No blockers.

turns.cn: 下午客户会你能参加吗？
turns.en: Can you join the client call this afternoon?
Two PM. I'll send an invite.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 6/12: Lunch with Colleague
scene: 中午你和同事去楼下吃午饭。（对话链：工作日）

turns.en: What do you want? Japanese or sandwiches?
Ha, no. Just in a good mood.

turns.cn: 下午客户会我帮你顶幻灯片。
turns.en: I'll cover slides on the client call if you need.
Thanks. Might take you up on that.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 7/12: Afternoon Client Call
scene: 下午你参加客户电话会，汇报进度。（对话链：工作日）

turns.cn: 登录优化周三提测，周五演示。
turns.en: Login fix to QA Wednesday. Demo Friday.

turns.cn: 短信延迟，我们加了备用通道。
turns.en: SMS delay. We added a backup channel.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 8/12: Leaving the Office
scene: 六点下班，你和同事道别。（对话链：工作日）

turns.en: Heading out? Don't be late for standup tomorrow.

turns.cn: 走了，明天见，你也别加班太晚。
turns.en: Yep. See you tomorrow. Don't stay too late.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 9/12: Commute Home
scene: 晚高峰地铁回家，你听不清广播。（对话链：工作日）

turns.en: …this stop is closed. Transfer next stop…

turns.cn: 不好意思，广播没听清，这站停吗？
turns.en: Sorry, I didn't catch the announcement. Does this stop run?

turns.cn: 停，但下两站施工，要换乘公交。
turns.en: Yes, but construction in two stops. Bus transfer.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 10/12: Stop at Grocery Store
scene: 回家路上进超市买点菜。（对话链：工作日）

turns.en: Do you have a loyalty card?

turns.cn: 有，手机号五五五一二三四。
turns.en: Yes. Phone five five five one two three four.

turns.cn: 一共十二块五，要袋子吗？
turns.en: Twelve fifty total. Need a bag?

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 11/12: Home Dinner
scene: 到家后简单做晚饭，和室友聊天。（对话链：工作日）

turns.cn: 累但还行，我炒个菜，二十分钟。
turns.en: Tiring but okay. I'll stir-fry something. Twenty minutes.
Don't forget deep clean this weekend.

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

title: Chain 12/12: Tired at Bedtime
scene: 晚上十一点，工作日结束，准备睡觉。（对话链：工作日）

turns.cn: 马上，回完这封邮件就睡。
turns.en: Almost done. One email then sleep.
You're right. You turn in too.
